mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates lower discount rates applied to equity cash flows, generating positive forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly increase in the unemployment rate signals immediate labor market deterioration, triggering negative short-term equity returns as earnings expectations are downgraded.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in >65% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand recovery, driving positive quarterly equity returns through earnings growth.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields negative 60-day returns in >55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during high inflation periods reflects supply-side resilience that supports corporate margins, producing positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3% annually.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating monthly inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and wage growth, supporting corporate revenues and generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Weak quarterly GDP growth combined with declining retail sales signals a synchronized demand contraction, forcing equity repricing and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in >50% of triggered quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly contraction in industrial production during tightening cycles indicates supply chain stress and falling output, triggering immediate negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict direction with >55% accuracy over 5-day horizons.
